page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a-nps1.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores using the x86_64 architecture. The processor is an AMD EPYC 7T83 running at a clock speed of 2.55 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU corresponds to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating systems and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and compute-heavy 1:2 RAM-to-vCPU ratio make this instance suitable for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading. It is designed for compute-intensive tasks such as high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, and front-end web serving where CPU execution speed and core dedication are prioritized over large memory footprints.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a-nps1.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz. Utilizing a KVM hypervisor, the instance allocates one physical core per vCPU with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading contention. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core memory density. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, relying on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for compute-heavy workloads such as batch processing, high-performance computing, and dedicated CPU-bound applications that require predictable, non-shared processing power.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a-nps1.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-performance CPU workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a-nps1.16xlarge features 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps bandwidth for compute-intensive workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core AMD EPYC compute instance with a 1:2 memory-to-core ratio for predictable, high-throughput processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 physical cores with no hyperthreading
128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor architecture with dedicated CPU allocation
No local storage or GPU resources included
Optimized for high-performance computing and batch processing
